message:
fix(correctness): reject duplicate evidence dimensions in disruption scorecard

Add ScorecardError::DuplicateEvidence { dimension } variant and check for
duplicate dimension keys when building the evidence lookup map in
compute_scorecard. Previously, BTreeMap::insert would silently overwrite
earlier evidence for the same dimension (last-writer-wins), which could
allow score manipulation by submitting duplicate evidence entries with
different values. Now returns an error immediately if a duplicate
dimension is detected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
